# novu_workflows (Data Source)

List of workflows. Retrieves all the workflows of the API Key's environment used for the provider configuration.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `search` (String) Case insensitive string to search for in the workflow_id or name of the workflows
- `status` (List of String) List of statuses to filter workflows by
- `tags` (List of String) List of tags to filter workflows by

### Read-Only

- `items` (Attributes List) The list of workflows (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Optional:

- `last_triggered_at` (String) Timestamp of the last workflow trigger
- `tags` (List of String) Tags associated with the workflow

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp
- `id` (String) Unique database identifier
- `name` (String) Name of the workflow
- `origin` (String) Origin of the workflow
- `slug` (String) Workflow slug
- `status` (String) Status of the workflow
- `step_type_overviews` (List of String) Overview of step types in the workflow
- `updated_at` (String) Last updated timestamp
- `workflow_id` (String) Workflow identifier
